name: Tuna--Potato Chip Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix potato chips with 1/2 cup of the shredded cheese and set aside.
2. Combine mashed potatoes, egg yolks, and dry mustard.
3. Stir in the tuna and remaining 1/2 cup of shredded cheese.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the potato-tuna mixture.
5. Transfer the batter to a greased 2-quart baking dish.
6. Sprinkle evenly with the potato chip mixture.
7. Bake at 375°F for about 45 minutes.
